name: 1. Simple Fact Question (Cache Only)
prompt: What is the capital of Japan?
note: Expected: cache only - simple question, no other optimizations needed

name: 2. Polite Verbose Question (Compression)
prompt: Could you please kindly explain to me how machine learning works? I would really appreciate it if you could provide a simple explanation. Thank you so much for your time and assistance!
note: Expected: compression + cache - lots of politeness markers to remove

name: 3. Excessive Whitespace (Whitespace Optimizer)
prompt: What    are    the     main      differences       between        relational        and         document          databases?           Please           explain.
note: Expected: whitespace + compression + cache - excessive spacing triggers whitespace optimizer

name: 4. Small JSON Dataset (TOON Conversion)
note: Expected: toon + cache - structured JSON data should trigger TOON (30-50% savings)

name: 5. Large JSON Dataset (Maximum TOON Benefit)
prompt: Generate insights from this customer transaction data:
note: Expected: toon + cache - large uniform dataset = maximum TOON benefit

name: 6. Code Generation Task (Conservative - Cache Only)
prompt: Write a Python function that implements a binary search algorithm with proper error handling
note: Expected: cache only - code task triggers conservative mode (accuracy first)

name: 7. Code with Verbose Request (Conservative)
prompt: Could you please write a function to sort an array? I would really appreciate detailed comments!
note: Expected: cache only - code task = conservative mode, compression skipped to preserve technical accuracy

name: 8. All Strategies Combined (Maximum Optimization)
prompt: Could   you    please    kindly    analyze     this     customer     data     and      provide      comprehensive      insights?      I      would      really      appreciate      detailed      recommendations!
note: Expected: ALL strategies (whitespace + toon + compression + cache) - maximum optimization

name: 9. Data Extraction Task (TOON Focus)
prompt: Extract key metrics and trends from the support ticket data:
note: Expected: toon + cache - data extraction task with structured data

name: 10. Cache Hit Test (100% Savings)
prompt: What is the capital of Japan?
note: Expected: cache HIT - duplicate of test #1, should hit semantic cache (100% cost savings)

name: 11. Multi-Model Comparison - Simple
prompt: Explain quantum entanglement in one sentence
note: Expected: cache only - simple question across multiple models

name: 12. Multi-Model Comparison - JSON
prompt: Identify the top 3 products by revenue:
note: Expected: toon + cache - JSON data across multiple models

name: 13. Nested JSON Structure (TOON Stress Test)
note: Expected: toon + cache - nested JSON structure tests TOON's capability with complex data

name: 14. Technical Documentation (Conservative Compression)
prompt: Please explain how to implement OAuth 2.0 authentication flow with refresh tokens and proper security measures
note: Expected: compression + cache - technical but not code generation, safe compression

name: 15. Mixed Content (Verbose + Short JSON)
prompt: Could you please kindly review this configuration and let me know if there are any issues? I would really appreciate your help!
note: Expected: toon + compression + cache - combines verbose prompt with small JSON
